headline: Is Kinder Morgan's Undervaluation a Buying Opportunity for Investors?
summary: KMI looks undervalued vs industry as take-or-pay contracts, LNG-linked volumes and a $10.1B backlog support a brighter gas outlook.

raw.headline: Is Kinder Morgan's Undervaluation a Buying Opportunity for Investors?

headline: Micron Technology and Houlihan Lokey have been highlighted as Zacks Bull and Bear of the Day
summary: Micron returns to a top buy list as AI-driven memory demand, sold-out HBM capacity and record results fuel expectations for more upside.
